headline: HOOD Stock Tumbles Post Q1 Earnings: Time to Buy the Dip or Bail Out?
summary: Robinhood drops 13% after Q1 2026 miss as crypto transaction revenue dives. Despite buybacks and expansion, risks keep piling up. Is this a buying opportunity?

headline: Charles Schwab (SCHW): A Target Cut Could Be Missing The Bigger Growth Story
summary: With stock buybacks of $4.58 billion in the 12 months through September 2025, The Charles Schwab Corporation (NYSE:SCHW) is among the 20 Stocks with the Biggest Share Buybacks. The Charles Schwab Corporation (NYSE:SCHW) received a revised analyst outlook on April 20 when Argus lowered its price target to $108 from $117 while maintaining a Buy rating following […]

headline: Forget Allowances, Most Teens Want to Know How to Invest
summary: It’s a prime opportunity for advisors who are looking to court the next generation of clients, according to a recent Schwab survey.

headline: Revisiting Stock Picks S&P Global, Charles Schwab, Viking Holdings
summary: Reviewing past stock picks is essential because it provides accountability and sharpens the investment process, helping identify what worked, what didn’t, and why.  That bounce was short lived, a red flag, and has since floundered.
